task_description: Identify key assumptions underlying the proposed weighting scheme for sentiment classification.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding the theoretical assumptions behind Delta TF-IDF weighting.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What assumptions does Delta TF-IDF rely on in sentiment classification?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Highlighted assumptions such as class-specific word distributions and discriminative term weighting.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Cross-checked assumptions against the discussion of class-specific IDF in Section 3.2 of the paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Rewrote the assumptions in my own words and added violation scenarios.
